SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-24-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF BERNICE CHUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JM MOVING SYSTEMS, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SHLOMO EITHAN ASRAF, DISPATCHER/OPERATIONS. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT JUST BEFORE THE HEARING BEGAN AND IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
